title: Huawei eKitOptiX FG736, Edge ONT & Dual-Band Wi-Fi 7 router
description: The Huawei eKitOptiX FG736 is a wireless dual-band Wi-Fi 7 router that is perfectly suited for combination with ONT units in bridge mode . It works simultaneously in the 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands, delivering a maximum total throughput of up to 3.57Gbps and is equipped with (2) 2.5G LAN/WAN ports and (2) 1Gbit LAN/WAN ports. The router is Mesh-compatible and can be wirelessly paired with other Huawei products to create a complete home network with a single SSID, allowing seamless roaming (2) 2.5Gbps LAN/WAN ports, (2) 1Gbit LAN/WAN ports and dual-band Wi-Fi 7 Total throughput up to 3.57Gbps - 688Mbps on 2.4GHz (2x2) and 2882Mbps on 5GHz (2x2) MU-MIMO - simultaneous connectivity for multiple devices Multi-Link Operation (MLO) - send and receive data simultaneously across different bands to increase throughput and reduce latency Beamforming - wider coverage and higher connection stability thanks to directional signal shaping Enhanced WPA3 security - the latest and most advanced Wi-Fi protection standard
specsSearch: Wireless features Maximum modulation 4096 QAM Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2880 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Roaming Yes Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 100/1000/2500Mbps LAN/WAN + (2) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN/WAN Gigabit LAN Yes Power Max. power consumption [W] 12 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset, WPS Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 325 Width [mm] 188 Height [mm] 140 Depth [mm] 35
